_comment: Integration config for PRF (winning route P1: convention-symmetric,
complete-core pool). SEPARATE per-semantics file because
today; run train_test with --semantics PRF --semantics_config <this file>.
Learned-side background = background_knowledge.lp + the FIXED directive
subset-maximal enumeration block ASPARTIX/preferred.lp itself carries,
so applying it to the learned side is symmetric (fact T4).
clingo_args --heuristic=Domain --enum=domRec apply to ALL stages via the
semantics-level list (required: plain clingo on preferred.lp returns the
show_predicates = in/1 ONLY at both train_test stages: preferred.lp
labellings are 3-valued (out=attacked, undec hidden) while the
completion-based learned side is 2-valued, so out/1 sets cannot match.
learn_heuristics=false (the old PRF entry had true).
NEVER use --negative_policy complete_not_target-style negatives for PRF.
